name: Registry Platform Crate APIs
surface: Shared Rust crate APIs for auth helpers, OIDC verification, audit envelopes and sinks, HTTP security middleware, outbound HTTP policy, Ed25519 JWK and DID helpers, SD-JWT VC issuance, and testing fixtures.
consumer_note: Relay, Witness, and future registry services should consume these primitives instead of reimplementing security or operational behavior locally.

name: Registry Relay OpenAPI
surface: Protected Registry Data API, metadata API, evidence offering verification, health, readiness, and optional standards adapters.
consumer_note: Registry Legend publishes a pinned demo snapshot until Relay has a release-grade export artifact.

name: Registry Witness OpenAPI
surface: Claim discovery, claim evaluation, batch evaluation, rendering, JWKS, service metadata, and credential issuance.

name: Metadata Manifest
surface: Portable `metadata.yaml` documents, compiled metadata model, policies, and evidence offering metadata.
consumer_note: Runtime source paths, scopes, table names, and backend URLs belong in Relay config, not manifests.

name: Static Metadata Publication Bundle
surface: Static index, catalog JSON, evidence offerings, policies, DCAT, BRegDCAT-AP, SHACL, and entity JSON Schemas.
consumer_note: The bundle can be hosted as static files without running Registry Relay.

name: System Capability Query Envelope
surface: Capability query envelopes, information needs, term labels, field terms, and evidence links.
consumer_note: v0.1 matching is strict and based on accepted machine terms.

name: Registry Lab Release Check
surface: Compose build, fixture generation, secret generation, smoke checks, and narrated demo flow.
consumer_note: Use as a demo acceptance path only; production contracts remain in the owning repos.
